text.tspan: Share of children engaged in labor by gender, 2023
Share of children aged 5–17 years which are engaged in economic activity. Child employment is defined based on the
amount of time spent participating in economic activities during the reference week of a survey.
Share of boys engaged in labor
Share of girls engaged in labor
Data source: UNICEF and International Labour Organization
